entries.source: Exam Prep Planner prompts and study loop

entries.source: For Exam Prep Planner, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Ar gyfer Exam Prep Planner, useful ymarfer dolen yw:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: Ar gyfer y modd hwn, mae’r dasg yn syml: Turn eich syllabus, exam date, time, a meysydd gwan i mewn i practical astudio plan.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good promptiau usually include three things: y subject, eich current level, a y kind of cymorth chi eisiau. chi do nid angen perfect wording. chi only angen enough context ar gyfer y session to begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Os y response feels too broad, narrow it. gofyn ar gyfer un example, un misconception, un gwirio cwestiwn, neu un next cam. os it feels too easy, gofyn ar gyfer challenge. os it feels too hard, gofyn ar gyfer bridge o beth chi already know.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gwneud yr output more useful

entries.value: Cynllunio

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Exam Prep Planner on inspir.
entries.value: Syniadau prompt a dolen astudio ailadroddadwy i gael canlyniadau dysgu defnyddiol o Exam Prep Planner ar inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Reading AI response yw nid y same as dysgu. ar ôl y first ateb, gofyn y modd to gwneud chi do something gyda yr idea.

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Hynny final recap yw important. pan chi explain yr idea back, chi reveal beth yw solid a beth yw still borrowed o yr AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Mae’r sesiynau dysgu gorau yn addasadwy. Planner prioritizes meysydd gwan, adds dolenni adolygu, a creates fallback plans ar gyfer missed days.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Exam Prep Planner is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Y ffordd gyflymaf o gael gwerth o Exam Prep Planner yw rhoi tasg ddysgu i’r AI, nid dim ond pwnc. Mae pwnc yn dweud beth sydd o ddiddordeb i chi. Mae tasg ddysgu yn dweud pa fath o gymorth sydd ei angen arnoch.

entries.source: Use Exam Prep Planner when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Speaking Practice. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Defnyddiwch Exam Prep Planner pan mai dyma’r modd cywir ar gyfer y dasg. Os ydych eisiau llwybr cysylltiedig, rhowch gynnig ar Speaking Practice. Gallwch hefyd bori’r blog dysgu AI am ddulliau astudio, dysgu Socratig, cardiau cof, chwarae rôl ac adfer gweithredol.
